full_text:
Design Partner Program Built around how your team delivers.
A two-week pilot, side by side with your team. After, a custom plan that fits how you deliver.
Talk to the team
How the pilot runs Two weeks. Humans + Andy.
01 Before
Andy learns how your team delivers.
Half a day with your team. Andy walks one real request from idea to merge, so it learns what good looks like on your team.
02 Two weeks
Andy joins your team.
Andy drafts code in your GitHub, hashes out trade-offs in your Slack, and only delivers when your team says go.
03 After
You see how much Andy lifts.
By week two, you'll know how many hours Andy gave back to your team and where it fits best. We shape a plan around that.
Fit check Who this is for.
You have 10+ people across product, design, and engineering delivering software.
Communication between roles eats 2 days of your week.
You want to plan faster and deliver without rework.
You want AI in your workflow, not on the side.
Fine print What you're signing up for.
Your code stays yours.
No model training on your data. Ever.
Every action is auditable.
Andy logs every change. Who, when, what.
You can leave anytime.
No multi-year lock-in. Clean exit, full data export.
Frequently asked questions
How much does the pilot cost? No setup fee. Pricing is usage-based, sized to your team's volume.
What happens after the two weeks? We share what worked and what didn't. If continuing makes sense for both sides, we shape a plan around your usage. If not, you exit clean.
How does MeetAndy handle code security? Your code never trains a model. Every Andy action is logged and auditable.
Let's talk.
30 minutes to learn about your team. No commitment. We'll tell you straight if Andy's a fit.
Talk to the team
